title: The Mystery at the Café
content: Customers at a small café kept finding fresh flowers on their tables every Monday morning. No employee admitted placing them there, and nobody ever saw who did it. The owner became curious and arrived very early the following week. Before sunrise, an elderly customer quietly entered with a basket of flowers. He explained that his late wife had loved the café, and leaving flowers there every Monday had become his way of remembering her. The mystery touched everyone who heard the story.
